_meta.description: Canonical versioning + compatibility policy for Koda data banks. Defines semantic version rules, compatibility gates, migration expectations, and boot-time enforcement so bank changes never silently break ChatGPT-like behavior.

config._comment: If a required bank fails compatibility checks, fail closed in prod/staging.
config._comment2: If a bank is missing required version metadata or violates semver formatting, treat as invalid.
config._comment3: When a bank changes major version, orchestrator must confirm compatible schema and migration plan exists.
config._comment4: Disallow loading banks with versions outside these ranges.

meaning.major: Breaking change: schema/fields/behavior changes that can affect runtime guarantees.
meaning.minor: Backward-compatible enhancement: new fields/features with safe defaults.
meaning.patch: Bugfix: no schema change; behavior should only improve/fix edge cases.

categoryCompatibility.notes: Control plane must be stable; breaking changes require explicit migration plan.
Schema changes must be coordinated with bank authors and loader.
Generated strict compatibility policy for required runtime category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Formatting is user-facing; regressions are unacceptable.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Overlays are optional; missing/changes should not block boot if marked optional.
Generated strict compatibility policy for required runtime category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Quality gates enforce safety + ChatGPT-like UX; must be reliable.
Triggers are optional; can be missing in prod if core routing still works.
Probes are CI/dev tools; not required for prod runtime.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.
Generated compatibility policy for optional/runtime-support category.

bankAllowlist._comment: Optional: restrict certain banks to known version ranges for safety. Use for critical banks.

ranges.notes: Must remain within v2.x for current orchestrator hooks.
Ensures short-paragraph rules and intro/conclusion behavior exist.
Ensures nav_pills pills-only contract and no inline Sources section.
Ensures hard-scope enforcement and no drift to unrelated docs.

migrationPolicy._comment: How to handle bank migrations when versions change.

bootValidation._comment: What the loader/orchestrator must validate at startup.

checks.assert: all loaded banks have valid semver in _meta.version
each bank version is within its categoryCompatibility min/max
banks in bankAllowlist.ranges are within allowedVersions
if a bank major version changed since last boot, migration notes exist

lastKnownStateStorage._comment: Where to persist last loaded versions so major-change detection works.

tests._comment: Lightweight sanity tests for this bank itself.
